name: Dislocator Crystal
description: Discolorations in the surface of this weapon appear, then fade in a random pattern. An elaborate handle contains a thumb-sized indent. When you activate a dislocator weapon, the next successful attack you make before the end of your turn causes your target to be teleported up to 10 feet in any direction you choose (Will DC 17 negates). You can't teleport a target into an occupied space (such an attempt automatically fails and wastes the effect). A dislocator weapon functions three times per day. Projectile weapons bestow this property on their ammunition.
